description: Create Statistical Process Control (SPC) charts from raw manufacturing data in ~/Documents/piston_ring_measurements.xlsx using WPS Spreadsheet. On the 'Raw Data' sheet, calculate 'Xbar' (mean of cols B-F) in Column G and 'R' (range of cols B-F) in Column H for all subgroups. Establish a 'Control Limits' sheet containing X-double-bar, R-bar, UCL_Xbar (X-double-bar + 0.577 * R-bar), LCL_Xbar (X-double-bar - 0.577 * R-bar), UCL_R (2.114 * R-bar), and LCL_R. Generate an 'X-bar Chart' sheet and an 'R Chart' sheet with line charts showing subgroup values and their respective reference lines. Create a 'Summary' sheet calculating Sigma_hat (R-bar / 2.326), Cp, and Cpk using USL (74.035) and LSL (73.965). Save the updated workbook.
